General.Name: Ourgame International Holdings
General.Description: Ourgame International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, develops and operates online card and board games, organising and broadcasting online to offline mind-sports events, tournaments, TV shows and content in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It operates an integrated online game platform that distributes PC games and provides services through its PC client portals, such as Ourgame Hall; and distributes mobile games and provides services primarily for Android and iOS operating systems through third-party distribution and payment channels, including mobile operators. The company also provides web games through its website ourgame.com, worldpokertour.com, and by third-party distribution channels; and hosts games and offers ongoing updates and technical support services for the operation of self-developed and licensed games, as well as preventing, detecting, and resolving in-game cheating and hacking activities. In addition, it provides computer-related technical support services; offers e-sports activities; and organizes and broadcasts online to offline mind-sports events, tournaments, TV shows, and content. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Grand Cayman, Cayman Islands.
